subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy recent letter hath arrived with tidings of the ascension of him who hath attained unto the presence of his Lord in the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه اخیر رسید خبر صعود من ادرک لقاء ربه فی الرفیق الاعلی حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @methods of teaching the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom
